question: Do I have a spare screwdriver for opening up my laptop?

retrieval_results.context:
User intends to visit a local electronics store to obtain a small screwdriver for the laptop RAM upgrade, and also wants instructions on how to select specific files and folders to back up on Google Drive.
User has decided to purchase the 100 GB Google Drive storage plan, believes it will suffice for their working files, plans to upgrade their laptop's RAM, and now has a spare screwdriver from earlier desk organization, feeling prepared but slightly anxious about the maintenance.

User is troubleshooting a wireless mouse freezing issue, is considering resetting the mouse per manufacturer instructions and will update drivers if resetting fails, taking a methodical approach.
User has chosen Google Drive as the cloud backup service, wants to enable versioning for their files, and is considering whether to upgrade their storage plan to accommodate versioning.
User has decided to use Backblaze for automatic backup of working files and wants to understand how Backblaze handles file versioning.
User has chosen the Anker cable organizer to fit in their bag, reflecting their desire to keep cables organized.
